loop._model_help: Model for plan/prover/review. 'opus' (default), 'sonnet', 'haiku', or a full id; or 'kimi'/'deepseek'/'openrouter' (need the matching key in .archon/.env). See docs/CONFIGURATION.md §4.
loop._debug_feedback_help: If true, agents may append notes to .archon/.debug-feedback/debug_feedback.md about missing capabilities or contradictory instructions. For improving Archon itself; off by default.
loop._claude_backend_help: How `claude` is launched: 'default' (claude -p) | 'vscode' | 'desktop' | 'claude-p' (headless TUI wrapper, subscription auth) | 'interactive' (you drive it by hand; forces serial, disables multilane). See docs/CONFIGURATION.md §1.
loop._axiom_sweep_help: If true, run a `#print axioms` sweep between prover and review to catch sorryAx laundering (declarations that compile clean yet depend on sorryAx). Writes .archon/logs/iter-NNN/axiom-sweep.{md,json}; never blocks. Slower (recompiles); on for soundness-critical projects.
loop._harness_help: One-line engine selector for ALL roles + subagents. Empty = Claude Code. Set to a name from the `harnesses` block to switch everything, e.g.  "harness": "codex". Narrower overrides win: loop.roles.<role>, subagents.<name>.harness. (Multilane lanes are unaffected.) See docs/CONFIGURATION.md §2.
loop._sync_leanok_timeout_sec_help: Seconds for the deterministic \leanok marker sync (it compile-checks each blueprint-referenced Lean file). Raise if you see 'sync_leanok ... timed out'. Default 1800 (30 min).

harnesses._help: Named engine descriptors. With no loop.harness/loop.roles set, every role uses Claude Code and this block is ignored. Route to one with, e.g.,  "loop": {"harness": "codex"}  (all roles) or  "loop": {"roles": {"prover": "codex"}}  (one role). 'codex' is built in. See docs/CONFIGURATION.md §2.

codex._env: Uses your native ~/.codex (ChatGPT) login and lets the Codex CLI choose its default model. To force a model, add 'model' to this descriptor. To route through a gateway, add 'base_url_env'/'key_env' (e.g. CODEX_BASE_URL/CZ_API_KEY) and set those vars in .archon/.env.

codex-gpt._help: Backward-compatible alias for the built-in codex harness.

_my_harness_example._help: Template for a custom harness. Copy this to a real name (drop the leading underscore), edit it, then point loop.harness / loop.roles.<role> / subagents.<name>.harness at that name. claude-code fields: model, backend. codex fields: model, effort, sandbox, mcp, base_url_env/key_env. See docs/CONFIGURATION.md §2.

antigravity._env: Runs the Antigravity CLI agent from Google DeepMind.

subagents._help: Subagents are OFF by default. Turn one on by adding its name to `enabled`, e.g.  "enabled": ["strategy-critic"]  (names are in `_available`), or  "enabled": "*"  to enable all of them. Per-subagent settings go under subagents.<name>. See docs/CONFIGURATION.md §3.
subagents._model_overrides_help: Override loop.model for one subagent: subagents.<name> = "opus"  or  {"model": "opus"}. Unlisted subagents use loop.model. Examples below.

state._help: recent_iter_window = how many recent per-iter sidecars (.archon/iter/iter-NNN/{plan,review}.md) are injected into the plan/review prompt. Larger = more memory, bigger prompt.

multilane._help: Set 'enabled' to true and add the lanes you want. Each lane uses Claude Code as its driver but routes requests to a different provider via ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL (set in .archon/.env).

_examples._help: Copy any of these into the 'lanes' list above to enable. Set the keys named in '_env' inside .archon/.env first.

kimi._extras: No extras package needed — Moonshot speaks the Anthropic API natively.

deepseek._extras: No extras package needed — DeepSeek speaks the Anthropic API natively.

openrouter._env: Set OPENROUTER_API_KEY and OPENROUTER_MODEL in .archon/.env (optional: OPENROUTER_BASE_URL). ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set to '' automatically so Claude Code uses the OpenRouter key instead of its own credentials.
openrouter._extras: No extras package needed — OpenRouter speaks the Anthropic API natively. Also used as an automatic fallback when kimi/deepseek keys are absent but OPENROUTER_API_KEY is set.
